attr.name: command
attr.value: urg -full64 -dir coverage/test_local_basic -dir coverage/test_local_seqnum_variation -dir coverage/test_local_invalid -dir coverage/test_remote_single_frag -dir coverage/test_remote_multi_inorder -dir coverage/test_remote_out_of_order -dir coverage/test_remote_mismatched_seq -dir coverage/test_remote_missing_fragment -dir coverage/test_reserved_bits_invalid -dir coverage/test_zero_fields_invalid -dir coverage/test_payload_len_boundary -dir coverage/test_back_to_back_mixed -dir coverage/test_drop_cnt_wrap -dir coverage/test_reset_midpacket -dir coverage/test_backpressure_local -dir coverage/test_backpressure_remote -dir coverage/test_coverage_full -report coverage/merged_report -format both
